name: notable_sights
description: Notable Sights table (Core Rules p.88). Roll D100 on the correct column. Not used during Invasion battles. Place sight 2D6+2 inches from center in random direction. Acquire by moving into contact and foregoing other actions that round.

NOTHING.name: Nothing special
NOTHING.instruction: No Notable Sight on the battlefield this mission.

DOCUMENTATION.name: Documentation
DOCUMENTATION.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Documentation. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Gain a Quest Rumor.

PRIORITY_TARGET.name: Priority Target
PRIORITY_TARGET.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Priority Target. Select a random enemy figure. Add +1 to their Toughness. If they are slain, gain 1D3 credits.

LOOT_CACHE.name: Loot Cache
LOOT_CACHE.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Loot Cache. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Roll once on the Loot Table (p.131).

SHINY_BITS.name: Shiny Bits
SHINY_BITS.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Shiny Bits. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Gain 1 credit.

REALLY_SHINY_BITS.name: Really Shiny Bits
REALLY_SHINY_BITS.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Really Shiny Bits. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Gain 2 credits.

PERSON_OF_INTEREST.name: Person of Interest
PERSON_OF_INTEREST.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Person of Interest. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Gain +1 story point.

PECULIAR_ITEM.name: Peculiar Item
PECULIAR_ITEM.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Peculiar Item. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Gain +2 XP.

CURIOUS_ITEM.name: Curious Item
CURIOUS_ITEM.instruction: NOTABLE SIGHT: Curious Item. Place marker 2D6+2" from center. Move into contact and forego other actions to acquire. Effect: Roll 1D6. On 1-4, sell for 1 credit. On 5-6, roll on the Loot Table (p.131).

placement.acquisition: Move into contact, forego all other actions that round
